title: Pre-A1 Assessment Pack
summary: Foundational pre-literacy and classroom communication standards for very early learners.
objectives: Recognize and respond to classroom routines.
Use isolated words and simple chunks with support.
Demonstrate comprehension through actions, matching, and visuals.
performanceIndicators: Follows one-step instructions with gestures.
Produces target words/chunks in controlled tasks.
Shows understanding through pointing, sorting, and basic TPR responses.
rubricBands: Exceeding: responds independently and accurately in familiar routines.
Meeting: responds correctly with light prompting.
Developing: needs repeated modeling and scaffolded prompts.
commonErrors: Confuses target classroom routines and commands.
Relies on L1 instead of target chunks.

title: A1 Assessment Pack
summary: Beginner standards for high-frequency language, controlled sentence production, and routine communication.
objectives: Use high-frequency vocabulary in simple contexts.
Produce short sentences using learned frames.
Understand and complete basic reading/listening tasks.
performanceIndicators: Uses target words accurately in guided output.
Maintains intelligible pronunciation in short exchanges.
Completes simple comprehension tasks with evidence.
rubricBands: Exceeding: accurate and mostly independent basic communication.
Meeting: generally accurate with occasional support.
Developing: partial control and frequent prompting required.

title: A2 Assessment Pack
summary: Elementary standards for connected language, basic grammar control, and task completion.
objectives: Use linked sentences to describe familiar topics.
Apply target grammar with moderate consistency.
Extract key details from short texts and audio.
performanceIndicators: Sustains short interaction with understandable output.
Uses core grammar in controlled-to-semi-open tasks.
Supports responses with details from source material.
rubricBands: Exceeding: clear, connected, and mostly accurate output.
Meeting: understandable and task-complete with minor errors.
Developing: uneven control and incomplete responses.

title: A1-A2 Transition Assessment Pack
summary: Bridge standards for learners moving from sentence-level production to short connected discourse.
objectives: Expand from fixed frames to flexible sentence patterns.
Use familiar vocabulary for short connected output.
Demonstrate comprehension with basic evidence language.
performanceIndicators: Produces 3-5 linked statements on familiar topics.
Uses a small range of connectors appropriately.
Completes integrated comprehension tasks with support.
rubricBands: Exceeding: coherent short discourse with controlled grammar.
Meeting: mostly coherent output with occasional breakdown.
Developing: fragmented output requiring heavy scaffolding.
exemplarTasks: Short response writing with evidence stems.

title: A2-B1 Transition Assessment Pack
summary: Transition standards for moving from routine communication to structured opinion and reasoning.
objectives: Develop paragraph-level spoken and written responses.
Use target language to explain reasons and outcomes.
Apply vocabulary and grammar to semi-open tasks.
performanceIndicators: Organizes ideas with basic logical flow.
Supports answers with simple reasons/examples.
Shows growing control of complex sentence patterns.
rubricBands: Exceeding: coherent and supported responses with clear logic.
Meeting: understandable reasoning with moderate accuracy.
Developing: limited support and inconsistent control.
commonErrors: Weak reasoning support in opinion tasks.

title: B1 Assessment Pack
summary: Intermediate standards for coherent communication, evidence use, and independent task execution.
objectives: Express and defend opinions with relevant support.
Sustain multi-step language tasks independently.
Use topic and academic vocabulary with control.
performanceIndicators: Builds coherent responses with clear structure.
Uses varied sentence forms with manageable errors.
References source details appropriately.
rubricBands: Exceeding: well-structured, accurate, and independent output.
Meeting: coherent output with occasional language slips.
Developing: partial coherence and limited support.

title: B1+ Assessment Pack
summary: Upper-intermediate bridge standards toward B2 with stronger argument quality and language range.
objectives: Develop nuanced explanations with clearer stance.
Use wider discourse markers and connectors.
Demonstrate stronger lexical precision in academic topics.
performanceIndicators: Expands and refines ideas with relevant qualifiers.
Maintains coherence across longer responses.
Shows control of mid-complexity structures.
rubricBands: Exceeding: confident, coherent, and precise argumentation.
Meeting: clear argument with manageable errors.
Developing: uneven range and occasional coherence gaps.
exemplarTasks: Synthesis response from two short sources.

title: B1-B2 Transition Assessment Pack
summary: Transition standards from intermediate to upper-intermediate academic communication.
objectives: Produce structured arguments with evidence and comparison.
Handle extended speaking/writing tasks with coherence.
Demonstrate wider vocabulary and functional accuracy.
performanceIndicators: Maintains clear argument line across sections.
Supports claims with examples and source references.
Balances fluency and accuracy in extended output.
rubricBands: Exceeding: persuasive and precise with sustained coherence.
Meeting: clear, supported output with occasional breakdown.
Developing: partially developed argument and uneven control.

title: B2 Assessment Pack
summary: Upper-intermediate standards for analytical communication, argumentation, and classroom transfer.
objectives: Develop clear arguments with well-selected evidence.
Use complex structures and cohesive devices effectively.
Adapt output to purpose, audience, and task constraints.
performanceIndicators: Sustains coherent extended discourse.
Uses topic-specific vocabulary with precision.
Demonstrates control in integrated skills tasks.
rubricBands: Exceeding: sophisticated, coherent, and highly accurate output.
Meeting: strong task fulfillment with minor issues.
Developing: adequate but inconsistent complexity/control.

title: C1 Assessment Pack
summary: Advanced standards for high-precision, flexible, and critically reasoned academic communication.
objectives: Deliver nuanced arguments with critical evaluation.
Integrate and synthesize multiple sources accurately.
Maintain register control and stylistic flexibility.
performanceIndicators: Produces highly coherent and well-structured responses.
Uses precise lexical/grammatical choices for meaning control.
Demonstrates strong source integration and critique.
rubricBands: Exceeding: polished, insightful, and academically robust output.
Meeting: strong advanced performance with limited issues.
Developing: competent but lacking consistency/precision.
commonErrors: Insufficient critical stance despite strong summary.

title: Starter A1 Assessment Pack
summary: Entry-level assessment standards for foundational listening, speaking, reading, and writing tasks.
objectives: Use high-frequency classroom vocabulary accurately.
Follow and respond to simple instructions.
Produce short, structured spoken and written outputs.
performanceIndicators: Understands key lesson words in context.
Uses sentence frames with limited support.
Completes low-complexity tasks with clear sequencing.
rubricBands: Exceeding: accurate output with independent use.
Meeting: mostly accurate output with minor support.
Developing: partial completion and frequent support needed.
commonErrors: Missing function words in short sentences.

title: Bridge A2 Assessment Pack
summary: Developing assessment standards for connected language, grammar control, and task completion.
objectives: Demonstrate control of target grammar in context.
Use linked sentences to explain ideas.
Apply lesson vocabulary to classroom tasks.
performanceIndicators: Maintains intelligible output in short interactions.
Uses target grammar with moderate consistency.
Completes reading/listening tasks with evidence.
rubricBands: Exceeding: consistent accuracy and clear reasoning.
Meeting: adequate accuracy with occasional slips.
Developing: uneven control and incomplete support.

title: Intermediate B1 Assessment Pack
summary: Intermediate standards for structured reasoning, language precision, and independent task execution.
objectives: Express and defend opinions with support.
Sustain multi-step speaking and writing tasks.
Integrate topic vocabulary with academic precision.
performanceIndicators: Builds coherent responses with logical flow.
Uses varied sentence structures appropriately.
Supports answers with relevant details.
rubricBands: Exceeding: precise, coherent, and self-corrected output.
Meeting: coherent output with manageable errors.
Developing: fragmented output and limited support.
exemplarTasks: Structured writing task with rubric cues.
